Hire EXPLORE MORE

Ntalo Investments

is a leading construction company specializing in civil and building construction, as well as health and safety plant hire equipment. With a proven track record of delivering high-quality projects, we combine technical expertise with a commitment to safety and innovation. Whether it’s constructing complex infrastructure or providing reliable, well-maintained equipment for site operations, Ntalo Investments is your trusted partner for comprehensive construction solutions.

Our workmanship

At Ntalo Investments, our workmanship is defined by precision, quality, and attention to detail. We take pride in delivering projects that meet the highest industry standards, ensuring durability and excellence in every aspect. With skilled professionals and a commitment to safety, we consistently provide reliable, top-tier construction services that exceed client expectations.

Learn More

Ntalo Investments offers a comprehensive range of plant and construction equipment hire services, ensuring projects are completed efficiently and safely. Our fleet includes well-maintained, modern equipment suited for various construction needs, from earthmoving to specialized safety gear. We prioritize reliability and safety, providing top-quality machinery that helps keep your projects on schedule and within budget.

Show Me How

Need to hire plant equipment ?

Enquire Now

Projects and Operations

Health and Safety

We are fluent and equipped with extensive experience and knowledge in ensuring the best health and safety standards in construction projects.

Project : Civil Engineering

Client: Raubex Group for City of Joburg, this was a Civil works project where we built a storm water drainage network

Plant and Equipment hire

Ntalo Investments owns and leases construction operations and plant hire resources

Trusted by

Ntalo Investments provides a reliable and well-maintained fleet of construction equipment and plant hire services, tailored to meet the demands of any project. From earthmoving machinery to specialized safety equipment, our comprehensive range ensures efficiency, safety, and cost-effectiveness. We are committed to delivering top-quality equipment that keeps your projects running smoothly and on schedule.

Ntalo Investments is a leading construction company dedicated to transforming visions into reality through expert civil and building construction services. With a commitment to quality and innovation, Ntalo Investments tackles projects of all sizes, from infrastructure development to residential and commercial buildings.

Office Address

Gauteng, South Africa
